section.div: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.
An Adaptive Methodology: Using Machine Learning to Identify Adaptations

Open datasets enable reproducible research but often suffer from survivorship bias: active registries preserve only currently operating entities, erasing historical records essential for longitudinal analysis. This repo introduces version-control archaeology, a computational method for recovering deleted records from Git versions of open datasets.
